recommendations.title: We're So Young
recommendations.overview: The life of Renato Russo, from his first involvement with music, to his years in the punk rock band Aborto Alétrico, to the formation of Legião Urbana, in the Brasília rock scene of 1970s and 1980s.

recommendations.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
recommendations.overview: Singer Freddie Mercury, guitarist Brian May, drummer Roger Taylor and bass guitarist John Deacon take the music world by storm when they form the rock 'n' roll band Queen in 1970. Hit songs become instant classics. When Mercury's increasingly wild li

recommendations.title: The Rocker
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a drummer is abandoned by his band just before they become rock superstars. Twenty years later, the drummer sees his second chance at stardom arise when he is asked to perform with his teenage nephew's high school rock band.

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: Okay! (The ASD Band Film)
recommendations.overview: Meet the four talented, autistic members of the ASD Band: piano prodigy Ron, with an impeccable memory for reciting the correct day of the week for any date in history; lead singer Rawan, who uses makeup to express herself and can hit an impressively

recommendations.title: AC/DC: Live At Donington
recommendations.overview: In August of 1991, AC/DC headlined their third "Monsters Of Rock" festival at Castle Donington. One for the ages, the two hour set is loaded with classics and awesome visuals including firing cannons, the hells bell and a giant inflatable Rosie.

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.title: Heavy Trip
recommendations.overview: Turo is stuck in a small village and the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. He and his bandmates have practiced for 12 years without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from

recommendations.title: Heavy Metal Mater
recommendations.overview: Mater and Lightning McQueen are ready to rock! When Mater's garage band, Mater and the Gas Caps, records a hit song, Mater becomes a rock legend. Then Lightning joins Mater's band for the rock concert of the century!

recommendations.title: I Used to Be Famous
recommendations.overview: A former boy band star unexpectedly gets a second shot at success when he forms a bond with a gifted young drummer.
